LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: APPELLANT LEGION CORPORATION FOR RELEASE OF LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2 APPEAL UNDERTAKING DEPOSIT FOLLOWING FULL PAYMENT OF UNCONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. APPELLANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION "FOR RELEASE OF LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2 APPEAL UNDERTAKING DEPOSIT FOLLOWING FULL PAYMENT OF UNCONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT" IS GRANTED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Appellant Legion Corporation For Release Of Labor Code Section 98.2 Appeal Undertaking Deposit Following Full Payment Of Unconditional Settlement; Memorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration Of Edward D. Clements In Support
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Appellant Legion Corporation For Release Of Labor Code Section 98.2 Appeal Undertaking Deposit Following Full Payment Of Unconditional Settlement.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Appellant's unopposed motion "for release of Labor Code section 98.2 appeal undertaking deposit following full payment of unconditional settlement" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
